economic_notes: Nation has investments in White Bear Lake Golf Course Inc., White Bear Lake Resort Inc., White Bear Holdings Ltd., White Bear Industrial Works Limited Partnership and Ltd. Oil and gas operations through White Bear Oil and Gas Enterprise, White Bear Oil and Gas Ltd., Wabimusqua Oil and Gas Ltd. Royalties and lease revenue from trust funds. Suspense account balance estimated in excess of $12,000,000 related to disputed northern boundary lands. COVID-19 pandemic response funded through additional government assistance.
notes: Fiscal year 2021 (ended March 31, 2021). Nation is located in Saskatchewan. 6 entities fully consolidated including oil and gas subsidiaries. 5 entities accounted for under modified equity method (GBEs). Suspense account of ~$12M+ in Ottawa Trust Fund related to disputed northern boundary lands - Nation has no access to these funds. COVID-19 pandemic response noted. CMHC replacement reserve underfunded by $282,847. Line of credit of $315,000 with $60,772 outstanding. Deferred revenue increased significantly from $2.67M to $4.77M largely due to COVID-related funding. Gain on disposal of tangible capital assets of $7,000 included in annual surplus. Housing expenses included within Community Infrastructure segment ($1,509,581). Capital expenses segment $1,014,646 and Other Band Programs $1,874,612 also reported. osr calculated as total revenue minus ISC, FNIHB, SITAG, CMHC, FSIN government transfers.
